title: Agent Auth Missing
objective: Prove OpenClaw fails a local agent turn clearly when model auth is missing, keeps the gateway responsive, and leaves no leaked child processes.

phases.title: Provision Missing-Auth Env
phases.intent: Start a disposable OpenClaw gateway without Kova mock or live model credentials.

phases.title: Missing Auth Agent Turn
phases.intent: Send a local agent message that must fail quickly and clearly because no provider credentials are configured.
commands: node {kovaRoot}/support/expect-command-fails.mjs -- ocm @{env} -- agent --local --agent main --session-id kova-agent-auth-missing --message 'Reply with exact ASCII text KOVA_AGENT_OK only.' --thinking off --timeout 30 --json

phases.title: Post-Auth-Failure Gateway Health
phases.intent: Verify the gateway remains responsive after the missing-auth agent failure.
